backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Product and Shopkeeper types with full CRUD operations, stock management, trending/shortlist toggles, and dashboard metrics, using stable Maps and principal-based shopkeeper lookup.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades old Product records to the new schema by adding mrp, wholesalePrice, discountPercent, unit, amenities, tags, and warranty fields with default values.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (world city search, extended product form fields, updated product display) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components and pages.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, primary, destructive, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Dukaan React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree for all app pages (dashboard, products, stock, trending, shortlist, network, registration) wrapped in AppLayout with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/common/CitySearc: Searchable combobox component for selecting a city from a world cities dataset, grouped by country with a default view of Indian cities and a 60-result cap.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: App shell component rendering a sticky maroon header with the Dukaan logo/branding, a centered main content area, and the BottomNav component.
frontend/src/components/layout/BottomNav: Renders a fixed bottom navigation bar with six links (Dashboard, Products, Stock, Trending, Saved, Network) that highlights the active route using saffron styling.
frontend/src/components/products/Product: Displays a product card with image, category, name, price, discount, stock badges, and a shortlist toggle button, navigating to the product detail page on click.
frontend/src/data/worldCities.ts: Exports a large static array of world cities with name, country, and searchTerm fields, organized alphabetically by country.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and expose the user's identity and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the app, including queries and mutations for dashboard metrics, products, shopkeepers, shortlists, and network data via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS with Tailwind directives, OKLCH-based design tokens (saffron, maroon, ivory) for light and dark themes, and utility classes for fonts, gradients, and card hover effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Displays a business overview dashboard with metric cards (total products, stock value, low stock alerts, etc.) fetched via `useDashboardMetrics`, including loading skeletons and navigation to related pages.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Shows detailed information for a single product (pricing, stock, tags, warranty, etc.) with actions to delete, toggle trending, toggle shortlist, and navigate to the edit form.
frontend/src/pages/ProductFormPage.tsx: Provides a create/edit form for products with fields for basic info, pricing (MRP, wholesale, discount), unit, amenities, tags, and warranty, using `useAddProduct` or `useUpdateProduct` based on route params.
frontend/src/pages/ProductList.tsx: Renders a searchable, filterable grid of products with category filtering, shortlist toggling, loading skeletons, and a button to navigate to the add-product form.
frontend/src/pages/ShopkeeperDetail.tsx: Displays a shopkeeper's profile detail page including shop name, owner, location, category, and contact info, fetched by ID via `useShopkeeperById`.
frontend/src/pages/ShopkeeperNetwork.tsx: Displays a searchable, filterable list of all registered shopkeepers with cards showing shop name, owner, location, and category. Includes navigation to individual shopkeeper profiles and a registration page.
frontend/src/pages/ShopkeeperRegistratio: Form page for registering a new shopkeeper with fields for owner name, shop name, location, phone, and category, including validation and submission via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/Shortlist.tsx: Displays a grid of shortlisted products with image, price, and stock info, allowing users to remove items from their shortlist via a toggle mutation.
frontend/src/pages/StockManagement.tsx: Shows all products sorted by stock level with inline editable quantity inputs and save buttons, highlighting low-stock items and displaying a summary banner for alerts.
frontend/src/pages/TrendingProducts.tsx: Renders a grid of trending products with shortlist toggle support, a banner showing the count, and an empty state prompting users to browse products.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Dukaan frontend, defining custom colors (saffron, maroon, ivory, gold using oklch), fonts (Baloo 2, Poppins), border radii, shadows, and animations including accordion and fade-in keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for Dukaan (v5), documenting the app's purpose, architectural notes, and a list of existing implemented features covering dashboard, product management, stock, trending, shortlist, and shop network screens.
